text: Entering this glass-walled, modern space, I feel a blend of curiosity and alertness. The fire extinguisher and coiled hose remind me of risk, yet the colors and the lights invite me forward. The next room, vibrant and layered with information, makes me feel like both an observer and a participant in the unfolding tapestry of technology and research. The wall proclaims 'R + D,' speaking of evolution and the dance between humanity and machines. Here, I sense the pulse of innovation and wonder what my role is within this relentless process of progress.
